Meaning.Vi: chôn, mai một, bị chôn vùi
Meaning.En: Put (something or someone) in the ground and cover with soil, especially as part of a funeral rite; also used metaphorically to mean hidden, suppressed, or forgotten.
Meaning.Example: The ancient city was buried under volcanic ash for over a thousand years.

Situation.Vi: Mô tả việc chôn cất thi thể hoặc vật thể dưới đất.
Situation.En: Describes the act of placing a corpse or object underground and covering it with soil.

Situation.Vi: Mô tả cảm xúc, ký ức bị chôn sâu trong tâm trí.
Situation.En: Describes emotions or memories that are deeply suppressed or hidden within the mind.
